title: Earthy Creamy Bean Sprouts Stir-Fry
description: This dish is a perfect representation of an earthy and creamy monsoon-style recipe featuring bean sprouts that are simmered in a flavorful sauce for optimal keto-friendly enjoyment.

ingredients.name: 3 cups (60g) trimmed bean sprouts, roughly chopped

instructions: Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in cream cheese, heavy whipping cream, and unsweetened almond milk. Cook for an additional 5 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together and thicken slightly.
Add chopped bean sprouts into the skillet, stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until they start to soften but still retain their crunchiness.
Season with black pepper to taste. Serve immediately as a side dish or main course.
